name: The Lunar Towers RPG
description:
Welcome to The Lunar Towers, a massive fantasy dungeon filled with body altering traps and lustful foes, chose between three classes, explore the different floors, and defeat (or succomb) to the powerful dragons that own these towers.

Featuring a wide variety of foes and traps, aswell as NPCs and treasure, all coming together into a lewd and vast experience, have fun getting lost in the dungeon~

First time trying something a little different, i hope you'll like it~

Art and concept by thekite

Visuals for the 3 classes:
creator: Bom742
